Class TableMetaData

java.lang.Object
iu.dao.TableMetaData
class TableMetaData extends Object
Holds table-level metadata for a primary or secondary table in a JPA entity mapping.

One instance is created for the primary table (alias "a") and one for each SecondaryTable annotation found on the entity class. Secondary tables receive sequential aliases starting at "b".

After all column metadata for an entity has been resolved, initializeJoinConditions(EntityMetaData) must be called on each secondary table to build the SQL equality conditions used in JOIN … ON clauses.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) final String
    alias
    SQL alias assigned to this table in generated queries (e.g.
    (package private) final String
    fullName
    Schema-qualified table name (schema.name), or the bare name when no schema is present.
    (package private) Iterable<JoinCondition>
    joinConditions
    Ordered sequence of SQL equality conditions used to join this secondary table to the primary table.
    (package private) final String
    name
    Unqualified table name as it appears in the database.
    (package private) final boolean
    primary
    true for the entity's primary table; false for secondary tables.
    (package private) final jakarta.persistence.SecondaryTable
    secondaryTable
    The SecondaryTable annotation that declared this table, or null for the primary table.

  • Field Details

    • name

      final String name
      Unqualified table name as it appears in the database.

    • fullName

      final String fullName
      Schema-qualified table name (schema.name), or the bare name when no schema is present.

    • alias

      final String alias
      SQL alias assigned to this table in generated queries (e.g. "a", "b").

    • primary

      final boolean primary
      true for the entity's primary table; false for secondary tables.

    • secondaryTable

      final jakarta.persistence.SecondaryTable secondaryTable
      The SecondaryTable annotation that declared this table, or null for the primary table.

    • joinConditions

      Iterable<JoinCondition> joinConditions
      Ordered sequence of SQL equality conditions used to join this secondary table to the primary table. Empty for primary tables and for secondary tables whose initializeJoinConditions(EntityMetaData) has not yet been called.

  • Constructor Details

    • TableMetaData

      TableMetaData(String name, String schema, String alias, boolean primary, jakarta.persistence.SecondaryTable secondaryTable)
      Constructs table metadata.
      Parameters:
      name - unqualified table name; must not be null
      schema - schema name; null or blank produces an unqualified fullName
      alias - SQL alias for this table in generated queries
      primary - true for the entity's primary table
      secondaryTable - the declaring SecondaryTable annotation, or null for the primary table

  • Method Details

    • initializeJoinConditions

      void initializeJoinConditions(EntityMetaData entity)
      Initializes the join conditions for this secondary table.

      This method is called once per secondary table during EntityMetaData construction, after all column metadata has been resolved. It is a no-op for primary tables.

      Condition derivation rules:

      • When SecondaryTable.pkJoinColumns() is empty, one condition is created per Id-mapped column in the entity, using the same column name on both sides.
      • When SecondaryTable.pkJoinColumns() is non-empty, one condition is created per entry using JoinCondition(String, jakarta.persistence.PrimaryKeyJoinColumn, EntityMetaData).
      Parameters:
      entity - owning entity metadata used to resolve primary-key columns
